titleStmt.title: SII 28.78: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 78. (A.R. No. 76 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Second gōpuram, left of entrance.

Registers the grant of two vēli of land in Maruṅgūr for the repairs to the temple of God Uttarāpati-nāyakar, in the Chīṟuttoṇḍa-nāyaṉār-tirumāḷigai, probably by the king in exchange (mārāḍi) for the land in Arumoḻimaṅgalam in Gēyamāṇikka-vāḷanāḍu, which had been given away as iṟaiili in favour of the servants (tiru-mēni) serving (aṉucharikkiṟa) in the Chīrāḷaṉ Chiṟuttoṇḍaṉ-tirumaṭam attached to the temple of the God Gaṇapatīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīparākkiṟama pāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu Āṭi mātam nāḷ
tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭi Uṭaiyār kaṇapaticcaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil cirāḷaṉ ciṟuttoṇṭaṉ tiru
maṭattukku viṭṭa nilamāy Ikkoyil Aṉucarikkiṟa tirumeṉikaḷukku Iṟaiyiliyāka maṇṭapattuk kaḻitta
jeyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu Arumoḻimaṅkalattu viṭṭa nilattukku māṟāṭi maruṅkūril viṭṭa nilam Iru
veliyum ciṟuttoṇṭa nāyaṉār tirumāḷikaiyil nāyaṉār Uttarāpati nāyakar tirukkoyilt tiruppaṇikku In
nāḷ mutalākak koṇṭu tiruppaṇiceyyavum Immutal veṟuyuṟac celavaḻittār Uṇṭākilc civatturokikaḷ paṭṭatupaṭaStops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
